sys_script_client.description: 2.8 .5 | 2024-06-06 | raj | DFCT0012415 - Subcategory is not hidden after clearing category on new task form - also clearing subcategory when category changes 2.8.0 | 2022-09-21| raj | STRY0130088 - 2.8 Certifier requested updates - 6. isLoading in OnChange ClientScript 2.8 | 2022-08-16 | raj | DFCT0011167 - Stretch: (Discussion Defect) SubCategory on Task Form should NOT display if the list is empty 2.8 | 2022-05-10 | raj | STRY0119573 - Task Form View- Quick Task: Standard
sys_script_client.name: Task - onChange/onLoad - Category
